biological_meaning: Genomic state predicts MORE aggressive regulatory state than observed; DNA panel looks driver-rich but transcriptome appears calmer
expected_subtype_signature: Possible early/treatment-responsive state or sampling bias toward less aggressive tumor region
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for spatial heterogeneity assessment; bulk transcriptome may miss aggressive subclones
notes: Intratumoral heterogeneity is well documented in glioma

biological_meaning: Regulatory state predicts MORE aggressive than DNA suggests; transcriptome hot with quiet driver panel
expected_subtype_signature: Possible non-genetic / epigenetic / microenvironment-driven aggressiveness
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for methylation profiling and microenvironment characterization

biological_meaning: Genomic and regulatory states are consistent (canonical biology)
expected_subtype_signature: Stereotyped molecular subtype: IDHwt GBM with EGFR amp + Chr7/10 + classical transcriptome; or canonical IDHmut codel
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Lower interpretive uncertainty; standard prognostic frameworks apply
notes: Most common case in canonical IDHwt GBM and IDHmut-codel

biological_meaning: Genomic state predicts WORSE clinical grade than observed
expected_subtype_signature: Grade 2/3 IDHmut-noncodel that has not yet progressed; or favorable host factors
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Watch closely for grade progression; consider closer imaging surveillance
notes: Common in early IDHmut-noncodel astrocytomas before high-grade transformation

biological_meaning: Clinical grade is WORSE than genomic state predicts (low-driver-load high-grade tumor)
expected_subtype_signature: Possible occult driver not captured by panel (e.g. H3 K27M-like) or microenvironment-driven aggressiveness
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for extended molecular workup including DNA methylation profiling and methylation-based classification
notes: May indicate alterations outside standard glioma panel

biological_meaning: Genomic and clinical states agree
expected_subtype_signature: Canonical presentation
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Standard clinical management appropriate

biological_meaning: Regulatory state predicts WORSE clinical state than observed; aggressive transcriptome with lower observed grade
expected_subtype_signature: Tumor shows aggressive transcriptome (e.g. mesenchymal program) but lower observed histologic grade
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Watch for histologic progression; aggressive transcriptional features predict transformation
evidence_citation: Wang 2017 Cancer Cell (mesenchymal transition with progression)
notes: Mesenchymal shift often precedes clinical progression

biological_meaning: Clinical state is WORSE than regulatory state predicts
expected_subtype_signature: Possible sampling issue or transcriptomically quiescent high-grade tumor
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Consider re-sampling; review pathology for diagnostic concordance

biological_meaning: Regulatory and clinical states agree
expected_subtype_signature: Canonical presentation
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Standard frameworks apply

biological_meaning: Patient shows substantial cross-modal regulatory inconsistency across multiple edges
expected_subtype_signature: Atypical / non-canonical glioma molecular pattern; may be intermediate between subtypes
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Candidate for molecular tumor board review; standard prognostic models may not apply

biological_meaning: Patient fits canonical regulatory geometry
expected_subtype_signature: Canonical IDHmut-codel / IDHmut-noncodel / IDHwt GBM presentation
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Standard subtype-based prognosis appropriate

biological_meaning: Patient looks most consistent under IDH-wildtype geometry
expected_subtype_signature: Aligns with IDHwt GBM molecular subtype
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Confirms IDHwt categorization; standard IDHwt treatment paradigm

biological_meaning: Patient looks most consistent under IDHmut-codel geometry
expected_subtype_signature: Aligns with oligodendroglioma
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Confirms IDHmut-codel categorization; favorable prognosis subtype

biological_meaning: Patient looks most consistent under IDHmut-noncodel geometry
expected_subtype_signature: Aligns with IDHmut astrocytoma
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Confirms IDHmut-noncodel categorization; assess for CDKN2A status for grading

biological_meaning: No subtype-specific sheaf cleanly fits the patient
expected_subtype_signature: Possible intermediate / transitioning tumor; atypical molecular profile
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for molecular tumor board; consider methylation classification (DKFZ classifier)

biological_meaning: Pathway-local inconsistency in RTK/RAS/PI3K signaling axis
expected_subtype_signature: Possible occult or non-canonical RTK pathway activation; aggressive EGFR-driven biology with apparent normal panel
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for extended sequencing of RTK pathway (EGFR full panel + EGFRvIII; PIK3CA hot-spot; PTEN promoter methylation)

biological_meaning: Pathway-local inconsistency in p53 axis
expected_subtype_signature: Possible MDM2/MDM4 amplification or p14ARF loss not captured by point-mutation panel
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Confirm p53 functional status; consider CDKN2A/B FISH or methylation analysis

biological_meaning: Pathway-local inconsistency in cell cycle / RB1 axis
expected_subtype_signature: Possible CDK4/CDK6 amplification or CDKN2A homozygous deletion missed by panel
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Confirm CDKN2A/B status (FISH or sequencing); now WHO 2021 high-grade IDHmut criterion

biological_meaning: Pathway-local inconsistency in telomere maintenance
expected_subtype_signature: Possible co-occurrence of TERT and ATRX-ALT mechanisms or absence of standard mechanism
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Test for ALT phenotype by C-circle / FISH assay; sequence TERT promoter hot-spots

biological_meaning: Inconsistency in MGMT / DNA repair axis
expected_subtype_signature: Possible discordance between MGMT methylation status and expression / repair capacity
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Validate MGMT methylation by methylation-specific PCR; consider MGMT IHC
notes: Practically actionable for TMZ response prediction

biological_meaning: Inconsistency in chromatin remodeling axis
expected_subtype_signature: Possible H3K27M or H3G34 mutation in adult cohort (rare but consequential)
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for H3 K27M / G34 testing; methylation-based classification

biological_meaning: Inconsistency in mesenchymal axis
expected_subtype_signature: Mesenchymal transition without classical NF1 loss; non-canonical MES drive
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for immune microenvironment characterization and STAT3 pathway analysis
notes: Mesenchymal state can be induced by therapy

biological_meaning: Pathway-local inconsistency in IDH/2-HG metabolic axis
expected_subtype_signature: Possible IDH variant outside R132H/R172 or canonical mutation with atypical downstream methylation
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Confirm IDH variant by sequencing; assess G-CIMP status

biological_meaning: Patient signature falls in low-transport-mass region across cohorts
expected_subtype_signature: Cohort-atypical regulatory pattern; predictive model may not transfer well for this patient
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Lower confidence in cross-cohort generalization for this patient; flag in clinical-decision pipelines

biological_meaning: Patient signature is well-aligned across cohorts
expected_subtype_signature: Cohort-typical regulatory pattern
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Standard cross-cohort confidence

biological_meaning: Patient features show strong consensus across discovery procedures
expected_subtype_signature: Stable; reproducible inconsistency profile
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Higher confidence in flagged inconsistencies

biological_meaning: Patient features show weak consensus across discovery procedures
expected_subtype_signature: Unstable / borderline inconsistency profile
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Lower confidence; require independent validation

biological_meaning: High inconsistency co-occurs with high immune infiltration
expected_subtype_signature: Likely Mesenchymal GBM with active immune microenvironment
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Candidate for immunotherapy trial enrollment (within decision-support framing)

residual_type: Combined high SRIS + high genomic instability
biological_meaning: Inconsistency co-occurs with high genomic chaos
expected_subtype_signature: Possibly hypermutator (MMR loss) or POLE-mutant tumor (rare in glioma)
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Flag for MMR / POLE testing; potential pembrolizumab eligibility
notes: Hypermutated glioma can respond to immune checkpoint blockade

residual_type: Cross-cohort transport stability OTStable(e) low for edge e
biological_meaning: Edge e residual channel is the one that drifts most between TCGA and CGGA
expected_subtype_signature: Channel-specific platform / population effect; patient-level evidence weak on this edge
clinical_decision_support_relevance: Down-weight evidence from this edge in cross-cohort decision support
